  "claims": [
    "California has set bold targets to achieve carbon neutrality by 2045.",
    "The state must quadruple its clean energy generation capacity by 2045.",
    "More than $30 billion in new transmission projects are needed by 2040.",
    "Critical transmission projects can face significant regulatory and environmental review delays, often taking a decade or more to complete.",
    "AB 941 establishes a statutory 270-day timeline for the California Public Utilities Commission to complete the Environmental Impact Review for priority transmission projects.",
    "AB 941 ensures that strong environmental safeguards remain in place while facilitating the integration of renewable energy.",
